ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the region */,
  "pop_density" REAL /* Population density per square mile */,
  "perc_below_pov" REAL /* Percentage of population below poverty line */,
  "perc_disabled" REAL /* Percentage of disabled individuals */,
  "perc_minority" REAL /* Percentage of minority populations */,
  "percent_multiunit_housing" REAL /* Percentage of multi-unit housing */,
  "perc_overcrowded" REAL /* Percentage of overcrowded households */,
  "perc_no_vehicle" REAL /* Percentage of households without a vehicle */,
  "perc_group_quarters" REAL /* Percentage of group quarters population */,
  "perc_fair_poor_health" REAL /* Percentage of population in fair or poor health */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "average_household_size" REAL /* Average number of people per household */,
  "poverty_gap" REAL /* Average shortfall of the total population from the poverty line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the region */,
  "perc_smokers" REAL /* Percentage of smokers in the population */,
  "perc_obese" REAL /* Percentage of obese individuals */,
  "perc_phys_inactive" REAL /* Percentage of physically inactive individuals */,
  "prev_hosp_rate_medicare" REAL /* Previous hospitalization rate for Medicare beneficiaries */,
  "air_pollution" REAL /* Air pollution index */,
  "unemployed" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  "age_adjusted_mortality" REAL /* Age-adjusted mortality rate */,
  "perc_hypertension" REAL /* Percentage of the population with hypertension */,
  "perc_heart_disease" REAL /* Percentage of the population with heart disease */,
  "perc_asthma" REAL /* Percentage of the population with asthma */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Vaccination rate for key vaccines */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_insurance_data" (
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the region */,
  "perc_diab" REAL /* Percentage of population with diabetes */,
  "perc_insuf_sleep" REAL /* Percentage of population reporting insufficient sleep */,
  "health_costs" INTEGER /* Average health costs in dollars */,
  "med_house_income" INTEGER /* Median household income in dollars */,
  "wnw_seg" REAL /* Weighting for non-white segment */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "perc_medicaid" REAL /* Percentage of the population covered by Medicaid */,
  "perc_private_insurance" REAL /* Percentage of the population with private health insurance */,
  "avg_out_of_pocket_costs" REAL /* Average out-of-pocket healthcare costs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_distribution" (
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the region */,
  "perc_fem" REAL /* Percentage of female population */,
  "perc_rural" REAL /* Percentage of rural population */,
  "pcp_rate_100k" REAL /* Primary care physician rate per 100,000 people */,
  "65_older" REAL /* Percentage of population aged 65 and older */,
  "17_younger" REAL /* Percentage of population aged 17 and younger */,
  "age_18_64" REAL /* Percentage of population aged 18-64 */,
  "age_0_4" REAL /* Percentage of population aged 0-4 */,
  "age_5_17" REAL /* Percentage of population aged 5-17 */,
  "age_65_74" REAL /* Percentage of population aged 65-74 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "uninsured_data" (
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the region */,
  "uninsured" REAL /* Percentage of uninsured population */,
  "lim_eng" REAL /* Percentage of population with limited English proficiency */,
  "perc_employed_uninsured" REAL /* Percentage of employed individuals who are uninsured */,
  "perc_children_uninsured" REAL /* Percentage of children who are uninsured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "region" (
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "state" TEXT /* State in which the region is located */,
  "county" TEXT /* County in which the region is located */,
  "population_density_category" TEXT /* Categorical representation of population density */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the region analyzed */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed report content */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "report_author" TEXT /* Name of the report author */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_reports_fips FOREIGN KEY ("fips") REFERENCES demographic_data ("fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_management" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login purposes */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last password change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the region accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent information */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_fips FOREIGN KEY ("fips") REFERENCES demographic_data ("fips")
)
